sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>10888<pc>1-0888<k1>uttara<k2>u/ttara<h>1
1. {#u/ttara#}¦ (von {#ud#})
<div n="1"> 1) <lex>adj.</lex> <lex>f.</lex> {#A#}, <ab>Decl.</ab>
<ls>P. 1,1,34.</ls> <ls n="P.">7,1,16.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 3,9.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 3,">12.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 3,">37.</ls>
<div n="2"> a) {%der obere, höhere%} (<ab>Gegens.</ab> {#aDara#})
<ls>AK. 3,4,192.</ls>
<ls>H. 828.</ls>
<ls>an. 3,524.</ls>
<ls>MED. r. 119.</ls> {#utta^rA\ sUraDa^raH pu\tra A^sIt#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,32,9.</ls> {#utta^rasmA\daDara^M samu\dram#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,98,5.</ls> {#sa\DasTa^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,154,1.</ls> {#sadma^#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,67,10.</ls> {#di\vaH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">4,26,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,20,6.</ls> <ls>AV. 10,2,24.</ls> {#aDa^re\ROzWe^na — utta^reRa#}
<ls>VS. 25,2.</ls> {#uttaraM hyudaramaDarA yoniH#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 7,5,1,38.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">8,6,2,15.</ls> {#aDare — uttare dantAH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">11,4,1,5.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">14,3,1,28.</ls> {#u/ttaramUlA#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,2,4,16.</ls> {#uttare jyotizI#} {%der Luft und des Himmels%}
<ls>NIR. 7,16.</ls>
<ls>TS. 5,2,8,4.</ls> — <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 2,2,2.</ls> <ls>CHĀND. UP. 3,15,1.</ls> {#uttarakAya#} {%der Oberkörper%}
<ls>RAGH. 9,60</ls>; <ab>vgl.</ab> <ls>P. 2,2,1.</ls> Vielleicht gehört hierher auch: {#e\vedDUrvfzRa\ utta^rA#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,33,18.</ls> {#utta^ro Du\ro va^hati#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,102,10.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) {%nördlich%} (wegen des gebirgigen Nordens)
<ls>AK.</ls> <ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> {#pUrva^smAdDa\Msyutta^rasminsamu\dre#}
<ls>AV. 11,2,25.</ls> <ls n="AV. 11,">5,6.</ls> {#pa\ScAdutta^rasmA\daDa^rAtpu\rastA^t#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,42,11.</ls> {#utta^rasyAM di\Si#}
<ls>AV. 4,14,8.</ls>
<ls>TS. 5,3,4,4.</ls>
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 5,5,4,21.</ls> {#dve vedI BavataH — uttarAnyA Bavati dakziRAnyottaro vE devaloko dakziRaH pitflokaH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">12,7,3,7.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 12,">8,3,6.</ls> <ls>M. 5,92.</ls> <ls>N. 12,43.</ls> <ls>R. 1,33,16.</ls> <ls n="R. 1,">41,22.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,22,8.</ls> <ls n="R.">4,1,16.</ls> <ls n="R. 4,">8,4.</ls> <ls>SUŚR. 1,19,11. 14.</ls> <ls>PAÑCAT. 241,7.</ls> {#mArutaH#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,76,17.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) {%der linke%} (weil man beim Gebet das Antlitz nach Osten richtet; <ab>vgl.</ab> {#dakziRa): utta^rasyAM di\Syutta^raM Dehi pA\rSvam#}
<ls>AV. 4,14,8.</ls>
<ls>VS. 25,5.</ls> {#uttaraH karRaH#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 12,2,4,6.</ls> {#UruH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">11,5,2,5.</ls> {#bAhuH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 11,5,2,">6.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,2,2,16.</ls> {#uttarAMsa#}
<ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 8,3,14.</ls> <ls n="KĀTY. ŚR.">17,2,11.</ls> {#gUQottarAMsAn#}
<ls>MBH. 1,7212.</ls> {#vyUQottarAMsAn#}
<ls n="MBH.">3,10249.</ls> {#pakzaH#}
<ls>TAITT. UP. 2,1.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) {%der spätere, hintere, folgend, bevorstehend, künftig%} (<ab>Gegens.</ab> {#pUrva#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab>; <ab>vgl.</ab> {#agra#} und {#aDara#}): {#yu\gAni^#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,33,8.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,10,10.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">72,1.</ls> {#dyUn#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,113,13.</ls>
[Page1-0889]
{#utta^rAmuttarA\M samA^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">4,57,7.</ls> <ls>VS. 38,28.</ls> <ls>AV. 12,1,33.</ls> {#praTama — uttara — tftIya#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,85,40.</ls> {#uttare 'han#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 13,3,2,1.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,8,1,30.</ls> {#yaH pUrva udDirantarikzaM tadya uttaro dyOH sA#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">6,5,2,22.</ls> {#uttarAmuttarAM SAKAm#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">9,3,3,6.</ls> {#pUrvAM pOrRamAsImuttarAM ca#}
<ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 2,1,1.</ls> {#uttara AzAQAH#}
<ls>AV. 19,7,4.</ls> {#vayasyuttare#}
<ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 4,1,18.</ls> {#uttarayoH savanayoH#} {%die beiden späteren%} (Mittagund Abend-) {%Spenden%}
<ls>AIT. BR. 6,8.</ls>
<ls>NIR. 1,19.</ls> <ls n="NIR.">2,10.</ls> <ls n="NIR.">7,17.</ls>
<ls>TAITT. UP. 1,3,1.</ls> <ls>M. 2,136.</ls> <ls n="M.">7,72.</ls> <ls n="M.">10,68.</ls> <ls>MBH. 3,10259.</ls> <ls>R. 1,71,24.</ls> <ls n="R. 1,">72,13.</ls> {#uttarARi ca kAryARi kurute#}
<ls n="R.">5,33,28.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,">47,22.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,">50,2.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,">56,112.</ls> <ls n="R. 5,">73,15.</ls> <ls>HIT. I,8.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 19,5.</ls> <ls>AK. 1,1,5,18.</ls> <ls n="AK.">2,8,2,55.</ls> {#uttarasUtre#}
<ls>P. 3,1,6</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#etasmAtsUtrAduttarezu dvirvacanezu#}
<ls n="P.">8,1,11</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab> <ls n="P.">3,1,83</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab> {#uttarakAvye#} {%am Schlusse des Gedichts%} (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#uttarakARqa#})
<ls>R. 1,3,38.</ls> {#gurUttarO#} {%die beiden auf eine lange Silbe folgenden%}
<ls>ŚRUT. 39.</ls> {#varzottarezu#} {%in spätern Jahren%}
<ls>SUŚR. 2,197,1.</ls> {#uttaraH kAlaH#} {%Zukunft%}
<ls>AK. 2,8,1,29.</ls>
<ls>H. 162.</ls> {#uttaraM kAlam#} {%künftig%}
<ls>R. 2,88,22.</ls> {#uttarakAla#}
<ls>MBH. 3,12511.</ls> {#Palamuttaram#}
<ls>AK. 2,8,1,29.</ls> {#uttaraM vAkyam (vacas#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab>) {%eine nachfolgende Rede%}, <ab>d. i.</ab> {%eine Fortsetzung der Rede%} oder {%Antwort%} (<ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> 4, {%d)%}: {#evamuktvA sa vacanaM vAzpapUritalocanaH . vAzpopahatayA vAcA nASaknodvaktumuttaram ..#}
<ls>R. 4,8,18.</ls> {#vaco muneruttaramAcakANkza#}
<ls n="R.">3,18,48.</ls> {#uttarAduttaraM vAkyaM vadatAM saMprajAyate#} {%ein Wort giebt das andere%}
<ls>PAÑCAT. I,69.</ls> {#pratyuvAcottaraM vAkyam#}
<ls>R. 4,3,4.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 1,4157.</ls> {#ityuktavantaM rAmastam — na SaSAkottarErvAkyEravarodDuM samudyatam#}
<ls>R. 3,1,33.</ls>
<div n="2">— e) {%superior, überlegen, siegreich, mächtiger%}: {#utta^rA\hamu^ttara\ utta\redutta^rAByaH#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,145,3.</ls> {#Satro^H Satro\rutta^ra\ itsyA^ma#}
<ls n="ṚV.">6,19,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,14,15.</ls> <ls>AV. 2,27,7.</ls> <ls n="AV.">3,5,5.</ls> {#saha^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,84,6.</ls> {#viSva^smA\dindra\ utta^raH#}
<ls n="ṚV. 10,">86,1.</ls> {#na mA\yayA^ Bava\syutta^ro\ mat#}
<ls>VS. 23,52.</ls>
<div n="2">— f) {%besser, trefflicher%}
<ls>AK.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> {#su\mnam#}
<ls>ṚV. 2,23,8.</ls> {#rU\pam#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,95,8.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">50,10.</ls> {#dakza^m#}
<ls n="ṚV.">6,16,17.</ls> {#anDa^sA SrI\Ranto\ goBi\rutta^ram#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,107,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) <lex>m.</lex>
<div n="2"> a) <ab>N. pr.</ab> ein Sohn <is>Virāṭa's</is>
<ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> <ls>MBH. 1,6988.</ls> <ls>LIA. I,686. 689.</ls> <ab>buddh.</ab> <ls>BURN. Intr. 176. fg. 334.</ls> ein König der <is>Nāga</is>
<ls>VYUTP. 85.</ls> {#uttaraSalaNkawAH#} <is>gaṇa</is> {#tikakitavAdi#} zu <ls>P. 2,4,68.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) <ab>N. pr.</ab> eines Berges: {#asti kAmpilyavizayaH — tatrottarAKyaSca giriH#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 25,23.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS. 25,">26.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#uttaraM parvatam#}
<ls>VIŚV. 13,14.</ls> {#dakziRasyottaro giriH#}
<ls>R. 4,63,16.</ls> <ls n="R. 4,63,">22</ls>
<ls>Ind. St. 1,163. 165. 171. 180. 181. 408.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) <lex>f.</lex> {#˚rA#}
<div n="2"> a) <ab>näml.</ab> {#diS#} {%Norden%}
<ls>H. 167.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls>
<ls>RĀJAN.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls> <ls>KATHĀS. 18,57.</ls> <ls>SIDDH. K.</ls> zu <ls>P. 1,1,28.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) <ab>N. pr.</ab> einer Tocher <is>Virāṭa's</is> und Schwiegertochter <is>Arjuna's</is>
<ls>MED.</ls> <ls>MBH. 1,169.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 1,">1946.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 1,">3835.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">14,1835.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 14,">1843.</ls> <ls>LIA. I,684. 686. 689.</ls> einer Sclavin
<ls>LALIT. 258. fg.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) <lex>n.</lex>
<div n="2"> a) ({%was oben auf liegt) Oberfläche; Decke%}: {#klinnapakzottarAH (patatriRaH)#}
<ls>DAŚ. 1,16.</ls> {#AnayeNgudipiRyAkaM cIramAhara cottaram#}
<ls>R. 2,103,20.</ls> meist am Ende eines <ab>adj. comp.</ab>: {#Asane vizwarottare#}
<ls>MBH. 3,1881.</ls> {#celAjinakuSottaram#} ({#Asanam#})
<ls>BHAG. 6,11.</ls>
<ls>R. 2,88,4.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 17,12.</ls> {#cyutEH SirastrEScazakottareva (raRakzitiH)#}
<ls n="RAGH.">7,46.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) {%Norden%}
<ls>R. 2,68,12.</ls> {#uttare#}
<ls n="R.">4,44,117.</ls> <ls>DHŪRTAS. 77,10.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) {%das nachfolgende Glied; der letztere Theil einer Zusammensetzung%}: {#Bavaduttaram#} <lex>adv.</lex> {%so dass%} {#Bavant#} (in der Anrede) {%folgt, am Ende steht%}
<ls>M. 2,49.</ls> {#SrezWArTe cottare sTitaH#} {%am Ende eines <ab>comp.</ab> hat%} ({#siMha#}) {%auch die Bedeutung von%} {#SrezWa#}
<ls>TRIK. 3,3,462.</ls> {#uttarasTa#}
<ls>MED. bh. 12.</ls> {#guRaSabda itarottaraH#}
<ls>H. 16.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) {%Antwort%} (<ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> 1, {%d%} gegen das Ende)
<ls>AK. 1,1,5,10.</ls>
<ls>H. 263.</ls>
<ls>an. 3,524.</ls>
<ls>MED. r. 120.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 70,3.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK. 70,">59</ls>, <ab>v. l.</ab> {#praSnottareRa#}
<ls>PRAB. 104,14.</ls> {#astItyuttaramuddiSya mamedam#}
<ls>MBH. 1,1920.</ls> {#uttaraM tasya vAkyasya na vaktavyaM kaTaM ca na#}
<ls>R. 3,70,7.</ls> <ls n="R. 3,">30,15.</ls> <ls n="R. 3,">51,32.</ls> {#brU#}
<ls>N. 17,29.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,14,1.</ls> {#prativac#}
<ls n="R. 1,">24,15.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 3,47.</ls> {#nottaraM pratyapadyata#}
[Page1-0890]
<ls>R. 4,18,1.</ls> <ls n="R.">2,1,8.</ls> {#tasyedamevottaraM vitarati#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. 127,21.</ls> {#uttaradAyaka#}
<ls>CĀṆ. 43.</ls> {#apasarpApasarpeti vAguttaramakurvatAm#}
<ls>MBH. 1,6704.</ls> {#taM baBAze SapaTottaram#} {%als Antwort auf die Verwünschung%}
<ls>KATHĀS. 14,52.</ls> {#nirAkftAnyottaratva#} {%Unwiderleglichkeit%}
<ls>H. 67.</ls> In der Gerichtssprache {%die Erwiederung auf die Anklage%} ({#BAzA#})
<ls>DHŪRTAS. 90,4. 18. 91,5.</ls> {#uttarABAsa#} <lex>m.</lex> {%eine scheinbare, trügerische, mangelhafte Erwiederung%}
<ls>VYAVAHĀRAT.</ls> im <ls>ŚKDR.</ls> In der <is>Mīmāṃsā</is> heisst das 4te Glied eines {#aDikaraRa#} {%Antwort%} ({#uttara#}) oder {%bewiesener Schluss%} ({#sidDAnta#})
<ls>COLEBR. Misc. Ess. I,301.</ls>
<div n="2">— e) {%Uebergewicht, Ueberlegenheit, Oberhand, Gewachsensein%}: {#na te niyudDe na jave na yogyAsu kadA ca na . kumArA uttaraM cakruH sparDamAnA vfkodaram#}
<ls>MBH. 1,4986.</ls> {#niyamAtsarvavarRAnAM Darmottaramavartata#}
<ls n="MBH. 1,">3976.</ls> {#samudrapAragamane kapInAM hi kimuttaram#} {%denn wie vermöchten die Affen das Meer zu überschreiten?%}
<ls>R. 5,70,18.</ls> {%Ueberschuss, Ueberfluss%}; am Ende eines <ab>adj. comp.</ab>: {#zazwyuttarasahasram#} {%Tausend mit einem Ueberschuss von Sechzig (1060%})
<ls>ITIH.</ls> bei
<ls>ROSEN</ls> zu <ls>ṚV. 18,1.</ls> {#saptottaraM Satam#}
<ls>YĀJÑ. 3,102.</ls> {#SatAni ca daSottarARi#}
<ls>MBH. 1,296.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">13,1143.</ls>
<ls>PAÑCAT. 157,24.</ls>
<ls>KATHĀS. 13,40.</ls>
<ls>BRAHMA-P. in LA. 57,15</ls> (wo wohl {#saptottarARi#} zu lesen ist).
<ls>H. 659.</ls>
<ls>LIA. I,502, N. 1.</ls> ({#paSUnAM triSatI#}) {#aSvaratnottarA#}
<ls>MBH. 14,2638.</ls> {#Sukle daSottare pakze#} {%am 10ten Tage der lichten Hälfte des Mondes%}
<ls n="MBH.">3,17126.</ls> {#svAdvannaM vA Bayottaram#} {%oder süsse Speise mit Gefahr verbunden%}
<ls>HIT. I,143.</ls> {#rAjYAM caritArTatA duHKottarA#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 61,18.</ls> {#guRottarARi sarvARi#}
<ls>MBH. 3,13922.</ls> {#ahametAnguRAnmanye BUyizWAMSca guRottarAn#}
<ls>R. 5,2,4.</ls> {#brahmaDarmottare rAjye#}
<ls>MBH. 1,3982.</ls> {#Darmottara#} {%dem Recht ganz ergeben%}
<ls>RAGH. 13,7.</ls> {#kasmAttAta tavAdyeha SokottaramidaM manaH#}
<ls>MBH. 14,1639.</ls> {#vyavasAyottaraM kapim#}
<ls>R. 4,42,11.</ls> {#jayottara#} {%voll des Sieges, des Sieges gewiss%}
<ls>MBH. 3,16363.</ls> {#atyantaBAvottarA#}
<ls>DHŪRTAS. 73,15.</ls> {#viBavottarA#}
<ls>VID. 219.</ls> {#saKIBirasrottaram#} (<lex>adv.</lex> {%mit Thränen im Auge%}) {#IkzitAmimAm#}
<ls>KUMĀRAS. 5,61.</ls> {#dolAndolanalolakaNkaRaraRatkArottaraM#} (<lex>adv.</lex>) {#sarpati#}
<ls>PRAB. 40,6.</ls> {#aDarmottaratA#}
<ls>MBH. 1,1607.</ls> Daher wohl {#uttara = pravaRa#}
<ls>H. an. 3,524.</ls>
<div n="2">— f) bei den Mathematikern {%Differenz, Rest%}
<ls>COLEBR. Alg. 251. 288.</ls>
<div n="2">— g) <ab>N.</ab> eines Gesanges ({#gItaka#})
<ls>YĀJÑ. 3,113.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#aDarottara, anuttara, ahamuttara, caturuttara#} .
<LEND>

<L>18132<pc>1-221-b<k1>uttara<k2>u/ttara<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#u/ttara#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 <lex>Adj.</lex> (<lex>f.</lex> {#A#}) mit <ab>Abl.</ab> <ls n="Chr.">231,32</ls>. <ls n="Chr. 231,">33</ls>. <div n="2">— a〉 {%der obere, höhere%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%nördlich, vom Norden kommend (Wind), nach Norden gerichtet%}. <div n="2">— c〉 {%der linke%}. <div n="2">— d〉 {%folgend, der hintere, spätere, künftig, der letzte%}. {#gu/ttara#} {%auf eine Länge folgend%}. {#daSottara#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%der eilfte%} <ls>MBH. 3,308,1</ls>. {#kAvya#} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%das letzte Buch des Poems%} <ls>R. 1,3,38</ls>. <div n="2">— e〉 {%superior, überlegen, siegreich, mächtiger%}. <div n="2">— f〉 {%in Process gewinnend%}. <div n="2">— g〉 {%besser, trefflicher%} <ls>R. 2,103,20</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 <lex>m.</lex> <div n="2">— a〉 {%Beantwortung einer Klage%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%gleichmässige Differenz der Glieder einer Prozession%} <ls>LĪLĀV. 103</ls>. <div n="2">— c〉 <ab>N. pr.</ab> <div n="3">— α〉 *eines Schlangendämons. <div n="3">— β〉 verschiedener Männer, <ab>insbes.</ab> eines Sohnes des <is>Virāṭa</is>. <div n="3">— γ〉 <ab>Pl.</ab> einer Schule. <div n="3">— δ〉 eines Berges. <div n="1">— 3〉 {#A#} <div n="2">— a〉 {%Norden%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%ein in seinem Namen mit dem Worte%} {#uttara#}. {%verbundenes Mondhaus%}. <div n="2">— c〉 <ab>Du.</ab> {%der 2te und 3te Vers eines%} <is>Tṛca</is> <ls>NYĀYAM. 9,2,6</ls>. <div n="2">— d〉 <ab>Pl.</ab> {%der zweite Theil der%} <is>Sāmasaṃhitā</is>. <div n="2">— e〉 <ab>N. pr.</ab> <div n="3">— α〉 einer Tochter <is>Virāṭa</is>ʼs. <div n="3">— β〉 einer Magd <ls>LALIT. 335,2. fgg.</ls> <div n="1">— 4〉 <lex>n.</lex> (<ab>adj. Comp.</ab> <lex>f.</lex> {#A#}) <div n="2">— a〉 am Ende eine <ab>adj. Comp.</ab> {%Oberfläche, Decke%}. <div n="2">— b〉 {%Norden%}. <div n="2">— c〉 {%das hintere Ende, der folgende Theil, der letzte Theil einer Zusammensetzung%}. {#smottara#} <lex>Adj.</lex> {%gefolgt von%} {#sma#} <ls n="Chr.">244,8</ls>. {#Bavaduttaram#} <lex>Adv.</lex> {%so dass%} {#Bavant#} {%folgt%}. <div n="2">— d〉 {%Folge, ein späteres Stadium%}. {#varzottarezu#} {%in späteren Jahren%} <ls>SUŚR. 2,297,1</ls>. {#duHKottara#} <lex>Adj.</lex> {%Leiden im Gefolge habend%} <ls>ŚĀK. 61,18</ls>. <div n="2">— e〉 {%Antwort%} <ls n="Chr.">136,1</ls>. <ls>Spr. 7826</ls>. <div n="2">— f〉 {%Beantwortung einer Klage%}. <div n="2">— g〉 {%Widerrede, Behauptung des Gegentheils%} <ls>CARAKA. 3,8</ls>. <div n="2">— h〉 in der <is>Mīmāṃsā</is> <ab>Bez.</ab> des 4ten Gliedes eines <is>Adhikaraṇa</is>, {%die Antwort,%} <ab>d. i.</ab> {%der bewiesene Schluss%}. <div n="2">— i〉 {%Oberhand, Ueberlegenheit%}. [Page1-221-c] {#uttaraM kar#} {%den Sieg davontragen%}. <div n="2">— k〉 am Ende eines <ab>adj. Comp.</ab> {%Haupttheil, der grösste, überwiegende Theil, das Hervorragende%}. {#kampottara#} {%heftig zitternd%}. {#vfzwyuttarA niSA#} {%sehr regnerisch%} <ls>RĀJAT. 7,1675</ls>. {#jayottara#} {%voll des Sieges, des Sieges gewiss%} <ls>MBH. 3,284,41</ls>. {#asrottaram#} <lex>Adv.</lex> {%ganz in Thränen%}. <div n="2">— l〉 {%Ueberschuss, ein Plus%}. {#Satamazwottaram#} {%hundertundacht%} <ls n="Chr.">212,28</ls>. Nur am Ende eines <ab>adj. Comp.</ab> könnte also auch als <lex>m.</lex> gefasst werden. <div n="2">— m〉 {%das im Stande Sein, Vermögen zu%} (<ab>Nom.</ab> <ab>act.</ab> im <ab>Loc.</ab>) <ls>R. 5,70,18</ls>. <div n="2">— n〉 {%ein in seinem Namen mit dem Worte%} {#uttara#} {%verbundenes Mondhaus%}. <div n="2">— o〉 {%ein <ab>best.</ab> Gesang%}. <div n="2">— p〉 {%eine <ab>best.</ab> rhetorische Figur%}. <div n="2">— q〉 <ab>Bez.</ab> {%des letzten Buchs%} im <is>Rāmāyaṇa</is>. <LEND>
